<svg width="100" height="100" viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="100" height="100" fill="#000"/>
  <!-- Watch face -->
  <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="40" fill="#fff"/>
  <!-- Hour hand -->
  <line x1="50" y1="50" x2="50+60*sin(0)" y2="50-60*cos(0)" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Minute hand -->
  <line x1="50" y1="50" x2="50+80*sin(0)" y2="50-80*cos(0)" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Second hand -->
  <line x1="50" y1="50" x2="50+90*sin(0)" y2="50-90*cos(0)" stroke="#ff0000" stroke-width="1"/>
</svg>

  </g>
</svg>
